title: Generate R program to derive ADSL (Subject-Level (treatment duration))

inputs.prompt: Write an R program using the admiral package to create the ADSL (Subject-Level (treatment duration)) analysis dataset. The program must: (1) Read relevant SDTM source datasets and merge with ADSL, (2) Derive key variables: TRTSDT, TRTEDT, TRTDURD, TRT01P, TRT01PN, (3) Handle treatment start/end date derivation from EX, duration computation, treatment variable mapping, (4) Apply ADaM variable attributes and metadata per specification, (5) Output xpt dataset with proper labels. The dataset contains approximately 254 records.
